name: DS-01 synbiotic urolithin A and butyrate healthy-adult trial
summary: Randomized placebo-controlled 91-day healthy-adult trial testing a multi-species synbiotic with pomegranate polyphenol substrate on urolithin A production, fecal butyrate, inflammation, and safety.
population: 32 healthy adults randomized to DS-01 or placebo for 91 days
